issues.description: TrashFromHand should be optional ("may trash"), but DSL structure makes it mandatory. Should use conditional/optional wrapper or restructure to make Rest dependent on trash choice.

SearchDeck filter is incomplete. Should search top 3 cards, reveal up to 1 {Impel Down} card, add to hand, then place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches and adds without showing the deck look/placement mechanic.

Missing action sequence: (1) Look at top 3 cards, (2) reveal up to 1 {Impel Down}, (3) add revealed card to hand, (4) place remaining cards at bottom in any order. DSL conflates these into single SearchDeck action.
Rest action should only trigger if a card was trashed. Currently appears to execute regardless due to thenActions structure not being properly conditional on the trash.
